label: 99 to 108 Repealed. , title XIII, § 1313,July 1, 1944, ch. 37358 Stat. 714
notes: Section 99, , as added , , authorized medical officers performing duties as quarantine officers to administer oaths. See .act Feb. 15, 1893, ch. 114, § 12Mar. 3, 1901, ch. 83631 Stat. 1087section 272 of this title
Section 100, , , provided compensation for use of State buildings for quarantine purposes.act Feb. 15, 1893, ch. 114, § 827 Stat. 452
Section 101, , , provided for acquisition of quarantine stations. See .act June 19, 1906, ch. 3433, § 534 Stat. 301section 267 of this title

Section 102, , as added , ; amended , , provided for establishment of quarantine grounds. See sections 267 and 271 of this title.act Feb. 15, 1893, ch. 114, § 10Mar. 3, 1901, ch. 83631 Stat. 1086July 1, 1902, ch. 1370, § 132 Stat. 712
Section 103, , , provided for control and management of quarantine grounds. See .act June 19, 1906, ch. 3433, § 134 Stat. 299section 267 of this title

Section 104, acts , ; , , provided for transferal of title of land and water from other departments to Service for its use.June 19, 1906, ch. 3433, § 234 Stat. 299Aug. 14, 1912, ch. 288, § 137 Stat. 309
Section 105, , , provided for notice of selection of places for quarantine stations and anchorages.act June 19, 1906, ch. 3433, § 334 Stat. 300

Section 106, acts , ; , ; , , provided penalties for trespass on quarantine stations. See .Aug. 1, 1888, ch. 72725 Stat. 355July 1, 1902, ch. 1370, § 132 Stat. 712Aug. 14, 1912, ch. 288, § 137 Stat. 309section 271 of this title
Section 107, , , provided penalties for the violation of quarantine laws by officers of Service. See .act Mar. 27, 1890, ch. 51, § 226 Stat. 31section 271 of this title
Section 108, , , provided penalties for the violation of quarantine laws by common carriers. See .act Mar. 27, 1890, ch. 51, § 326 Stat. 32section 271 of this title
